name: X Press Check
description_short: X Press Check Cashing offers check cashing, payday loans, auto title loans, and money transfer services in West Sacramento, CA with extended weekend hours.
description_long: X Press Check Cashing operates as a check-cashing and financial services storefront located at 964 Sacramento Ave in West Sacramento, California. The business has been serving the local community and appears to operate multiple locations, with customer references to a Marysville Boulevard branch. The company positions itself as a one-stop alternative financial services provider for consumers seeking quick cash access and payment solutions. X Press Check Cashing advertises a broad range of services including check cashing, payday loans, auto title loans, bill payment, money orders, Western Union transfers, and Net Spend debit card products. This service mix targets consumers who may lack traditional banking relationships or need rapid funding outside standard banking hours. The company distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, remaining open until 7:00 PM on Fridays and 4:00 PM on Saturdays, providing accessibility beyond typical business hours. However, the company carries a notably poor reputation based on available customer reviews, with a 2.0 out of 5 star rating and significantly more negative than positive feedback. Multiple reviewers report excessive fees on check cashing services, poor customer service interactions, and frustration with staff availability and responsiveness. One customer specifically cited being charged what they considered an unreasonable fee to cash a $70.38 check, while another complained about long wait times and inattentive service. The combination of high-cost services and negative customer experiences suggests this operator may not deliver strong value relative to alternatives, despite addressing a genuine market need for quick cash access.
pros: Extended hours including Friday evening (until 7:00 PM) and Saturday afternoon service
Multiple service offerings under one roof (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, payday loans)
Serves customers who lack access to traditional banking
Accepts check cashing requests for various check types
Located in West Sacramento with accessible street address
Offers bill payment services in addition to cash advances
Provides Western Union money transfer capability
cons: Very poor customer satisfaction with 2.0/5 star rating and predominantly 1-star reviews
Multiple complaints about excessive fees charged on check cashing services
Service quality issues including inattentive staff and long wait times at counter
Customer reports of rising rates and declining service quality over time
Limited transparency on pricing and loan terms according to customer feedback
best_for: Consumers in West Sacramento needing same-day check cashing outside standard banking hours
Customers requiring money orders or Western Union transfers with convenient local access
Individuals seeking payday loans or auto title loans despite poor value proposition
diagnosis: X Press Check Cashing serves consumers in West Sacramento who need urgent cash access outside traditional banking hours, particularly for check cashing and money orders. The critical caveat is the company's documented history of high fees and poor customer service, making it advisable to compare rates and terms with alternative check-cashing providers or banks before using their services.
